pageDescription: We believe the best insights come from leaders in the field. Share your perspective on governance, impact, strategy, or growth—and contribute to the conversation.

reward.title: Monthly Reward
reward.description: Each month, we select the most compelling perspective and award its author a <bold>£100 Amazon voucher</bold>. Selected perspectives may also be featured in our publications.

form.name: Name
form.perspectivePlaceholder: Share your insight, observation, or point of view on a challenge facing organisations today...

success.title: Thank You
success.message: Your perspective has been received. We review all submissions monthly and will be in touch if your insight is selected for publication or the monthly reward.

guidelines.title: Submission Guidelines
guidelines.g1: Focus on a specific insight, challenge, or opportunity
guidelines.g2: Draw from real experience where possible

toast.successMessage: Thank you for sharing your insight. We review all submissions monthly.
toast.errorMessage: Please try again or contact us directly.
